Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
Skill levels exceeding an activity's main skill requirement gives +1.25% extra Work efficiency for what you're doing, up to 20 levels.

Hunting chest

From Walkscape Walkthrough

This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.
Hunting chest
Type: Container
Keyword: Chest

This horned chest appeared after your latest hunt. Maybe it is also a creature of some kind, impressed by your skill and sharing its spoils.

Hunting chest is an openable treasury item. It can drop while doing Hunting activities, and can be obtained from some other sources. These Chests are the only way to obtain some Hunting based Equipment. They can have the odds of finding them increased with the Chest Finding equipment attribute.

Loot Tables

These are the sub-tables for the various materials, coins, and items that can come from these chests.

These treasury items make 4 independent loot rolls when they are opened.

Main Loot Table

50.010% Per Roll (93.755% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Copper arrows 5-12 8.335% 29.398% ~1 in 3 0 (0-0)
Feather 10-20 8.335% 29.398% ~1 in 3 0 (0-0)
Bronze arrows 4-11 6.820% 24.614% ~1 in 4 0 (0-0)
Hide scraps 10-20 6.820% 24.614% ~1 in 4 0 (0-0)
Animal meat 2-3 5.304% 19.587% ~1 in 5 1 (2-3)
Iron arrows 3-10 5.304% 19.587% ~1 in 5 1 (3-10)
Hunting memosphere 1-2 3.031% 11.584% ~1 in 9 0 (0-0)
Steel arrows 2-8 3.031% 11.584% ~1 in 9 1 (2-8)
Jerky 1 1.515% 5.924% ~1 in 17 12 (12)
Tarsilium arrows 2-5 1.515% 5.924% ~1 in 17 2 (4-10)

(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Coins 10-100 20.586% 60.227% ~1 in 2 1 (10-100)
Shark tooth trinket 1 1.054% 4.150% ~1 in 24 96 (96)

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Alligator hunting Hunting lvl. 50 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 135,750 steps 75,500 steps
Bear hunting Hunting lvl. 45 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 120,500 steps 71,000 steps
Bird feeding Hunting lvl. 5 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 20,000 steps 16,000 steps
Bird watching Hunting lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 55,500 steps 34,750 steps
Box trapping Hunting lvl. 40 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 57,250 steps 36,000 steps
Crab tracking Hunting lvl. 10 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 38,750 steps 31,000 steps
Deer hunting Hunting lvl. 35 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 86,000 steps 52,250 steps
Drift net hunting Hunting lvl. 30
Fishing lvl. 25		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 59,250 steps 37,250 steps
Ectoplasm slime hunting Hunting lvl. 55 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 39,250 steps 17,250 steps
Halfmaw tracking Hunting lvl. 45 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 222,000 steps 148,000 steps
Lizard hunting Hunting lvl. 30 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 49,250 steps 31,000 steps
Predator fishing (Spear) Fishing lvl. 55
Hunting lvl. 45		 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 62,500 steps 28,500 steps
Rabbit tracking Hunting lvl. 1 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 25,000 steps 21,000 steps
Squirrel hunting Hunting lvl. 15 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 43,000 steps 33,250 steps
Unicorn hunting Hunting lvl. 60 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 183,500 steps 70,750 steps
Wolf hunting Hunting lvl. 25 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 73,500 steps 49,000 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Achievement Name Quantity Requirement
Jack Of All Trades 1 Have every skill at least level [50].
